name: Aditya Kumar
bioText: Full Stack Developer (MERN & Java Spring Boot) graduating 2026, with 2 concurrent internships and 15+ deployed production projects. Proficient in React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, MySQL, REST API design, JWT Authentication, and Spring Security. Ranked #1 in CSE department; proven track record delivering scalable, secure full-stack applications in agile environments.

about.whoIAm: Hello! I'm Aditya, a full-stack developer passionate about building clean, efficient, and scalable web applications. I specialize in the MERN Stack and Java Spring Boot, crafting end-to-end solutions that deliver high performance and great user experiences.
about.whatIDo: I design and build robust web systems, consume/create RESTful APIs, and write optimized database schemas. I focus on clean architecture, agile collaboration, and taking complete product ownership from development to deployment.
about.myJourney: With over 2 years of hands-on experience, I have successfully completed 2 industry internships and independently deployed 15+ live full-stack projects. I graduated as the top ranker (#1) in the Computer Science & Engineering department, combining academic excellence with practical execution.
about.vision: To build high-performance products that solve real-world problems and write maintainable, clean code that stands the test of time.
about.beyondCode: Love techno & house music, follow F1 (Max), play chess, and read regularly. Travelled recently to Bali, and a month in Thailand/Vietnam in 2025.
